'''foyaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabinlike|cabinlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabinlike|cabinlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| foyaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:foyarithi|foyarithi]] || [[word:foyariji|foyariji]] || [[word:foyarishi|foyarishi]] || [[word:foyariki|foyariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:foyaruthuthu|foyaruthuthu]] || [[word:foyarujuju|foyarujuju]] || [[word:foyarushushu|foyarushushu]] || [[word:foyarukuku|foyarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:foyaruthu|foyaruthu]] || [[word:foyaruju|foyaruju]] || [[word:foyarushu|foyarushu]] || [[word:foyaruku|foyaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:foyarufthuf|foyarufthuf]] || [[word:foyarufjuf|foyarufjuf]] || [[word:foyarufshuf|foyarufshuf]] || [[word:foyarufkuf|foyarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:foyarethe|foyarethe]] || [[word:foyareje|foyareje]] || [[word:foyareshe|foyareshe]] || [[word:foyareke|foyareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:foyarothotho|foyarothotho]] || [[word:foyarojojo|foyarojojo]] || [[word:foyaroshosho|foyaroshosho]] || [[word:foyarokoko|foyarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:foyarotho|foyarotho]] || [[word:foyarojo|foyarojo]] || [[word:foyarosho|foyarosho]] || [[word:foyaroko|foyaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:foyarofthof|foyarofthof]] || [[word:foyarofjof|foyarofjof]] || [[word:foyarofshof|foyarofshof]] || [[word:foyarofkof|foyarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:foyar챦fth챦f|foyar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fj챦f|foyar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fsh챦f|foyar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fk챦f|foyar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:foyar챦fth챦fth챦f|foyar챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fj챦fj챦f|foyar챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fsh챦fsh챦f|foyar챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fk챦fk챦f|foyar챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:foyar챦fth챦f|foyar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fj챦f|foyar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fsh챦f|foyar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fk챦f|foyar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:foyar챦fth챦f|foyar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fj챦f|foyar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fsh챦f|foyar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:foyar챦fk챦f|foyar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:foyar챈th챈|foyar챈th챈]] || [[word:foyar챈j챈|foyar챈j챈]] || [[word:foyar챈sh챈|foyar챈sh챈]] || [[word:foyar챈k챈|foyar챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:foyarathatha|foyarathatha]] || [[word:foyarajaja|foyarajaja]] || [[word:foyarashasha|foyarashasha]] || [[word:foyarakaka|foyarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:foyaratha|foyaratha]] || [[word:foyaraja|foyaraja]] || [[word:foyarasha|foyarasha]] || [[word:foyaraka|foyaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:foyarafthaf|foyarafthaf]] || [[word:foyarafjaf|foyarafjaf]] || [[word:foyarafshaf|foyarafshaf]] || [[word:foyarafkaf|foyarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:foyarasha|foyarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:foyarsh챘sha|foyarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foyarosha|foyarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foyarmusha|foyarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:foyaryasha|foyaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofoyarnksh챘sha|gofoyarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofoyarnkrosha|gofoyarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofoyarnkmusha|gofoyarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofoyarnkyasha|gofoyarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:foyayarasha|foyayarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:foyayarsh챘sha|foyayarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foyayarosha|foyayarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foyayarmusha|foyayarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:foyayaryasha|foyayaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofoyayarnksh챘sha|gofoyayarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofoyayarnkrosha|gofoyayarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofoyayarnkmusha|gofoyayarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofoyayarnkyasha|gofoyayarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fey챈rasha|fey챈rasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fey챈rsh챘sha|fey챈rsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fey챈rosha|fey챈rosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fey챈rmusha|fey챈rmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fey챈ryasha|fey챈ryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofey챈rnksh챘sha|gofey챈rnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofey챈rnkrosha|gofey챈rnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofey챈rnkmusha|gofey챈rnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofey챈rnkyasha|gofey챈rnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:foyfarasha|foyfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:foyfarsh챘sha|foyfarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foyfarosha|foyfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foyfarmusha|foyfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:foyfaryasha|foyfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofoyfarnksh챘sha|gofoyfarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofoyfarnkrosha|gofoyfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofoyfarnkmusha|gofoyfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofoyfarnkyasha|gofoyfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
